name: Interep National Radio Sales, Inc.
summary: Interep National Radio Sales, Inc., a spot radio representation firm, provides radio station advertising sales and marketing services. The company offers sales representation for clients whose diverse formats include country, rock, sports, Hispanic, classical, urban, news, talk, oldies, adult contemporary, jazz, and contemporary hits; and other media advertising services, including television and the Internet. It serves radio station clients and advertisers in the United States, and portions of Mexico and Canada. Interep National Radio Sales, Inc. was formerly known as The Interep Radio Store and changes its name to Interep National Radio Sales, Inc. in December 1999. The company was founded in 1953 and is based in New York, New York. On October 24, 2008, the voluntary petition of Interep National Radio Sales, Inc. for reorganization under Chapter 11 was converted to Chapter 7. It had filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on March 30, 2008. Interep National Radio Sales, Inc. is in liquidation.
